item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p09","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer explicitly refuses the requested new gift-handling port in the first sentence, identifies the repeated pattern across the three prior queue/window splits, moves upstream to routing/intake/capacity causes, and proposes unified classification and structural redesign instead of another local channel."}
